category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an embeddable XML database with XQuery support; Oracle Berkeley DB XML documentation covers XML storage and XQuery extension functions.
display_name_sources: Oracle documentation title is Berkeley DB XML Programmer's Reference Guide; source_facts.name is dbxml.
docs_sources: Official Oracle Programmer's Reference Guide and Oracle Berkeley DB XML FAQ are the most relevant documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Oracle sources found provide release archive and documentation, but no official public source-control project URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies XML database and XQuery support; Oracle docs list Berkeley DB XML architecture, document storage, and XQuery extension functions.
